subject: fix(patterns): APP_ICONS naming conformance + SafeStorage reclassification
body:
Pattern-audit findings applied. Two fixes, one skip.

1. APP_ICONS — renamed icon-1024.png → icon.png to match the pattern
   spec (glow-props docs/implementations/APP_ICONS.md prescribes the
   1024-size asset as `icon.png`, not `icon-<size>.png`).
   - scripts/generate-icons.mjs ICONS list updated.
   - vite.config.ts ICON_PATHS + manifest maskable icon src updated.
   - public/icon-1024.png renamed via git mv, then regenerated via
     `npm run generate-icons` to confirm clean output.
   - iconCacheBust test unchanged — it asserts manifest icons carry
     versioned URLs, not specific file names. Still passes at both
     source-level and dist-level after rebuild.

   Added APP_ICONS section to CLAUDE.md "Adopted Patterns" documenting
   what's generated, what's deliberately NOT generated (adaptive-icon
   and splash-icon — see below), and the file-location deviation
   (public/ flat instead of pattern's assets/images/).

   Skipped from pattern's full file list with justification:
   - adaptive-icon.png (1024): pattern expects a separate SVG with 80%
     safe-zone padding for Android adaptive foreground. We have one
     icon-source.svg; using it as purpose:maskable directly is the
     closest viable conformance without designing a second SVG.
     Revisit if native-Android builds ship.
   - splash-icon.png (1024): only consumed by Expo/Metro native builds.
     sun-sea-o is a Vite PWA — iOS Safari generates splash from
     apple-touch-icon.png; Android splash comes from manifest
     theme_color. No consumer, no file.

2. SafeStorage — reclassified in CLAUDE.md "Adopted Patterns" as a
   repo-local utility, not a glow-props pattern. Verified against
   glow-props/docs/implementations/ — no SAFE_STORAGE.md exists there;
   the concept appears only as an internal section in THEME_DARK_MODE.
   Header wording updated to acknowledge the one non-pattern entry so
   readers don't hunt for a phantom upstream pattern. The utility's
   code and consumers are unchanged.

3. Z_INDEX_SCALE constants-module extraction — not applied. The
   pattern doesn't mandate a src/constants/zIndex.ts; it prescribes
   the scale (which sun-sea-o already follows, values inline at call
   sites, documented in CLAUDE.md Adopted Patterns). Extracting a
   constants module would be premature abstraction per the
   useCallback-omit-default rule's spirit.

Test fix collateral: ContractUploadPreview's rename-button
getByRole({name: 'One'}) queries no longer match since the earlier
a11y pass added aria-label="Rename section <title>". Queries updated
to match by regex (/Rename section "One"/) so they stay robust to
future label rephrasing.

Verified: 155/155 tests pass, tsc -b clean, eslint clean, npm run
build clean.

Tags: patterns, icons, docs, a11y
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: custom-code-reduction
Semver: patch

title: APP_ICONS naming conformance + SafeStorage reclassification
